design_philosophy: A crypto-native, high-energy casino. Deep void blacks mixed with neon accents to create a command-center for gamblers. Sharp edges, glowing states, and high-performance UI.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid (for Dashboard) & The Tetris Grid (for Game Lobby)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, left-aligned data and forms, centered hero elements.

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0C]/60 border-b border-white/5

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E701] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#00FF01] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,231,1,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1C1A27] text-white hover:bg-[#2A2739] border border-white/10 transition-colors

game_thumbnails.style: Aspect-ratio preserved covers with hover overlay.
game_thumbnails.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-sm

hero_banner.description: Neon abstract gaming background for hero section

live_casino_category.description: Roulette table for live casino lobby

sportsbook_cricket.description: Cricket stadium match banner for sports betting

crypto_wallet_promo.description: Neon Bitcoin sign for wallet or crypto deposit promotion

animations_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background or border color and use 'transition-all duration-200'.
animations_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for game lists and leaderboard rows.
animations_and_interactions.live_indicators: Pulse animation on 'Live' badges (Laser Green or Danger Red).
animations_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have a 2px solid ring using the primary accent.

icons.style: Use stroke-width='1.5' for a clean, sharp look. Icons in active states should glow or take the primary accent color.

testing.attributes: All buttons, inputs, game thumbnails, and navigation links MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'play-crash-button', 'deposit-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS extensively for styling.
Implement the 'Unbounded' font for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Add them via Google Fonts in index.html and extend tailwind.config.js.
For the Game Lobby, build a responsive grid displaying the 18 games. Use the provided images or mock colorful abstract divs for individual game thumbs not covered by URLs.
The wallet section should feel highly secure. Use dark elevated surfaces (bg-[#1C1A27]) with subtle neon glowing borders when an input is focused.
Admin Dashboard: Ensure dense data layout. Use tables with subtle borders (border-white/5). Do NOT use generic white backgrounds anywhere.
CRITICAL: Adhere to the 'Electric & Neon' archetype colors strictly. Do NOT introduce default Tailwind blues or generic grays without tinting them toward dark indigo (#13111C).
